name: Catch Settings
body: [{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"The below table lists the settings available for Catch, and what each setting does."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"table","children":[{"type":"thead","children":[{"type":"tr","children":[{"type":"th","attributes":{"colspan":"1","rowspan":"1"},"children":[{"text":"Name"}]},{"type":"th","attributes":{"colspan":"1","rowspan":"1"},"children":[{"text":"Description"}]}]}]},{"type":"tbody","children":[{"type":"tr","children":[{"type":"td","attributes":{"colspan":"1","rowspan":"1"},"children":[{"text":"API Key"}]},{"type":"td","attributes":{"colspan":"1","rowspan":"1"},"children":[{"text":"The API Key grants Maropost Commerce access to your Catch account to list products and manage sales orders. Find your Catch API key "},{"type":"a","url":"https://www.netohq.com/support/s/article/set-up-catch#2","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"here"}]},{"text":"."}]}]},{"type":"tr","children":[{"type":"td","attributes":{"colspan":"1","rowspan":"1"},"children":[{"text":"Where would you like to manage Catch offers from?"}]},{"type":"td","attributes":{"colspan":"1","rowspan":"1"},"children":[{"text":"Choose how products on Catch are managed, either from Maropost Commerce or directly in Catch."}]}]},{"type":"tr","children":[{"type":"td","attributes":{"colspan":"1","rowspan":"1"},"children":[{"text":"Numeric field value rounding"}]},{"type":"td","attributes":{"colspan":"1","rowspan":"1"},"children":[{"text":"If enabled, number fields will be rounded to match Catch requirements. Usually only affects weight, height, length and width."}]}]},{"type":"tr","children":[{"type":"td","attributes":{"colspan":"1","rowspan":"1"},"children":[{"text":"Pricing value"}]},{"type":"td","attributes":{"colspan":"1","rowspan":"1"},"children":[{"text":"Determines how products on Catch get their prices, from Maropost Commerce or another source (e.g. directly in Catch)."}]}]},{"type":"tr","children":[{"type":"td","attributes":{"colspan":"1","rowspan":"1"},"children":[{"text":"Customer group"}]},{"type":"td","attributes":{"colspan":"1","rowspan":"1"},"children":[{"text":"If product prices are sent from Maropost Commerce, choose which customer price group is used."}]}]},{"type":"tr","children":[{"type":"td","attributes":{"colspan":"1","rowspan":"1"},"children":[{"text":"Empty product price"}]},{"type":"td","attributes":{"colspan":"1","rowspan":"1"},"children":[{"text":"If you select a price group other than the default, choose what to do if the price value is empty. Either fallback to the default, or not provide a price."}]}]},{"type":"tr","children":[{"type":"td","attributes":{"colspan":"1","rowspan":"1"},"children":[{"text":"Enable promotion pricing"}]},{"type":"td","attributes":{"colspan":"1","rowspan":"1"},"children":[{"text":"If enabled Catch will use product promotion prices if available."}]}]},{"type":"tr","children":[{"type":"td","attributes":{"colspan":"1","rowspan":"1"},"children":[{"text":"Stock level values"}]},{"type":"td","attributes":{"colspan":"1","rowspan":"1"},"children":[{"text":"Determines where products on Catch get their stock levels from, Maropost Commerce or another source (e.g. directly in Catch)."}]}]},{"type":"tr","children":[{"type":"td","attributes":{"colspan":"1","rowspan":"1"},"children":[{"text":"Stock level limit"}]},{"type":"td","attributes":{"colspan":"1","rowspan":"1"},"children":[{"text":"If you use stock levels from Maropost Commerce, you can list all available stock, or set a maximum amount each product can list."}]}]},{"type":"tr","children":[{"type":"td","attributes":{"colspan":"1","rowspan":"1"},"children":[{"text":"Stock level buffer"}]},{"type":"td","attributes":{"colspan":"1","rowspan":"1"},"children":[{"text":"If enabled, set a stock amount to be excluded from listing on Catch."}]}]},{"type":"tr","children":[{"type":"td","attributes":{"colspan":"1","rowspan":"1"},"children":[{"text":"Untracked inventory quantity"}]},{"type":"td","attributes":{"colspan":"1","rowspan":"1"},"children":[{"text":"If you list all available stock to Catch, set a stock amount to list for products that don’t track inventory levels."}]}]},{"type":"tr","children":[{"type":"td","attributes":{"colspan":"1","rowspan":"1"},"children":[{"text":"Received order statuses"}]},{"type":"td","attributes":{"colspan":"1","rowspan":"1"},"children":[{"text":"Map Catch order statuses to Maropost Commerce statuses for a smoother sales order workflow."}]}]},{"type":"tr","children":[{"type":"td","attributes":{"colspan":"1","rowspan":"1"},"children":[{"text":"Catch shipping option"}]},{"type":"td","attributes":{"colspan":"1","rowspan":"1"},"children":[{"text":"Map your Catch standard shipping to a Maropost Commerce shipping service that will appear on all sales orders when created."}]}]},{"type":"tr","children":[{"type":"td","attributes":{"colspan":"1","rowspan":"1"},"children":[{"text":"Handling time (required)"}]},{"type":"td","attributes":{"colspan":"1","rowspan":"1"},"children":[{"text":"Enter the amount of days between order received and dispatch. This can be overwritten at the product level."}]}]},{"type":"tr","children":[{"type":"td","attributes":{"colspan":"1","rowspan":"1"},"children":[{"text":"Content type"}]},{"type":"td","attributes":{"colspan":"1","rowspan":"1"},"children":[{"text":"Select which content tree is used for Catch category mapping."}]}]}]}]}]
